programmes.show_description: Having opened an official inquiry into DCI Jo Davidson and Operation Lighthouse, AC-12 suspect a cover up. Steve and Chloe find links between Gail Vella and their previous cases.
In the first episode, presenter Kathryn Thomas looks at the almost overnight emergence of weight loss medications and explores their huge impact. (SL)
The Matariki stars shine their light on love and loss. Esther has a magical moment. Dawn drives to her destiny.
Eden and Cash are navigating the logistics of Remi staying with them long term, only made more complex as John sticks his nose in.
A behind-the-scenes look at the series that explores the most successful animal group on Earth, from the tiny Etruscan shrew to the largest mammal in existence - the blue whale.
New documentary celebrating the life and legacy of Ireland's great liberator on the 250th anniversary of his birth.
A bickering couple are reunited in their quest to locate a legendary hoard of treasure. Romantic comedy adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Kate Hudson and Donald Sutherland.
Grey Sloan takes in patients following a catastrophic bus accident; Teddy and Owen have an awkward encounter; Richard tests Bailey's patience.
Dale embraces his success, hosting a lavish birthday party. Meanwhile, Helen is struggling personally and professionally.
Drew's intrigued when Chris teases the HOD spot for his support against TK.
Mackenzie and Levi are counting down the days until Mac's pregnancy has hit the 12-week threshold and they can finally spread the word of their pregnancy.
This week's teams must produce 36 perfect Mont Blancs alongside a chocolate amenity.
Kevin and the team head to South Heredforshire to meet retired furniture maker Lucinda, who wanted to construct something for herself.
Kicking Bishop Brennan Up the A*se: After cheating in a football match, Ted is given a forfeit by his Rugged Island rivals - forcing him to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside.
Singer, actress and former X-Factor contestant Mary Byrne (65) from Ballyfermot is ready to face her fear and find love again after ten years of single life.
Everyone's really excited when Sister Michael announces the school trip this year is to Paris.
